description: Camera-motion T2V test prompts for Wan2.2 TI2V-5B. Each prompt describes a mostly static scene with an explicit, dominant CAMERA movement, so generated videos reveal whether the model renders the camera move (not just object motion). Use the `prompt` field as the text input to scripts/diffsynth_pure_t2v_fp32.py (--prompt). Save each output together with its text input.
negative_prompt: static shot, fixed camera, no camera movement, jitter, blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark

prompts.prompt: The camera slowly dollies forward, pushing in toward a single wooden chair in the center of an empty sunlit room. Smooth steady camera motion moving straight ahead, dust floating in the light. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly pulls back, dollying away from a lit campfire on a quiet beach at dusk, gradually revealing more of the wide empty shoreline. Smooth backward camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera pans smoothly to the left across a long bookshelf filled with old leather books, sweeping past the spines one after another. Steady horizontal rotation of the camera. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera pans smoothly to the right across a city skyline at sunset, sweeping past skyscraper after skyscraper. Steady horizontal camera rotation. Cinematic, photorealistic.
The camera tilts upward from the base of a giant redwood tree, slowly craning its view up the towering trunk toward the canopy and sky. Smooth vertical camera tilt. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera orbits in a smooth circular arc around a vintage red sports car parked in an empty studio, revealing it from every angle as the camera circles. Steady 360 orbiting camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera cranes upward and rises high above a crowded outdoor market, lifting smoothly to a high vantage point looking down at the stalls. Steady upward boom camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

A tracking shot follows a lone cyclist riding down a tree-lined road, the camera moving alongside at the same speed keeping the rider centered. Smooth lateral tracking camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

An aerial drone shot flies forward over a vast green mountain valley with a winding river below, the camera gliding steadily ahead high above the landscape. Smooth forward aerial camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera slowly zooms in on a single blooming red rose in a quiet garden, the framing tightening steadily until the petals fill the frame. Smooth optical zoom-in, background unchanged. Cinematic, photorealistic.

A handheld first-person camera walks forward through the doorway of an old stone castle and down a torch-lit corridor, the view advancing steadily deeper inside. Smooth forward walking camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.

The camera descends straight down from above toward a spiral staircase, smoothly lowering into a top-down bird's-eye view of the winding steps. Steady downward craning camera motion. Cinematic, photorealistic.
